    "RX.2": 0.7,

  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",

    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "Polish sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, concision, and flow while preserving meaning and tone.",
    "RX.1": "Ensure wording maintains appropriate uncertainty where claims are preliminary or hardware-dependent.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported numbers and caveats support.",
    "RX.3": "Keep edits strictly within style/clarity without adding or removing content or interpretations.",
    "RX.4": "Prevent phrasing that could mislead readers about efficiency or generality and thus cause misuse.",
    "RX.5": "Retain all original datasets, figures, and numerical results so the provenance remains clear and traceable."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: Polish sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, concision, and flow while preserving meaning and tone.
rationale.RX.1: Ensure wording maintains appropriate uncertainty where claims are preliminary or hardware-dependent.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported numbers and caveats support.
rationale.RX.3: Keep edits strictly within style/clarity without adding or removing content or interpretations.
rationale.RX.4: Prevent phrasing that could mislead readers about efficiency or generality and thus cause misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Retain all original datasets, figures, and numerical results so the provenance remains clear and traceable.
